build.name: VRNLite (NO DEBRID)
build.description: (IMPORTANT: ON FIRST RUN, ELEMENTUM TAKES A BIT TO INSTALL ITSELF. MAKE SURE TO RESTART AFTER ITS DONE) Just a lite build that doesnt need debrid. Uses elementum with burst, Simple PVR and The loop.

build.name: VRNLite (DEBRID ONLY)
build.description: (IMPORTANT: DEBRID ONLY) Just a lite debrid build. Uses POV, Simple pvr and The loop
